name: Samsung 130cm (52 inch) Full HD LED Smart TV
description: Experience the brilliance of Samsung's 130cm (52 inch) Full HD LED Smart TV. With its stunning display and smart features, this TV offers an immersive viewing experience. Enjoy your favorite shows and movies in vibrant colors and sharp details. The sleek design adds a touch of elegance to your living space. Upgrade your entertainment setup with Samsung's cutting-edge technology and enjoy endless hours of entertainment.
